CodexDryChecker.docs: D3: public API unchanged. Internal private subprocess helpers (spawn_codex, run_codex_child timeout-poll loop, drain_pipe, tee_stderr_to_file, prepare_runtime_path, AutoCleanup) are extracted to a shared pub(crate) module, leaving CodexDryChecker's pub surface (new, DryCheckAgentPort impl) identical to baseline.

CodexReviewer.docs: D3: public API unchanged. Internal private subprocess helpers (spawn_codex, run_codex_child timeout-poll loop, drain_pipe, tee_stderr_to_file, runtime_path, AutoManagedArtifacts) are extracted to a shared pub(crate) module, leaving CodexReviewer's pub surface (new, with_scope_label, Reviewer impl) identical to baseline.

infrastructure::dry_check::corpus::sha25.docs: D3: canonical SHA-256 -> lowercase hex encoder already in infrastructure::dry_check::corpus. The inline format!('{hash_bytes:x}') in codex_dry_checker.rs delegates to this function post-remediation, eliminating the semantic dup with corpus fingerprinting.
